1765020.name: Arm Wrestling Reborn
1765020.description:
When you defeat "Slick Rick" a local strongman at the corner bar, you are quickly launched into the professional arm wrestling circuit and find out you're pretty good at it. Experience the life as an arm wrestler in the modern day arm wrestling circuit with a real arcade button smasher. Press the keys fast enough to pin your opponent while knowing when to distribute power, so you don't break your opponents arm. Play as greenhorn Troy Walker on his adventure to become champion in a super match against Chuck Mobb.

Over 2 years of development time has gone into simulating a real professional arm wrestling match. View real professional arm wrestling matches on YouTube.

🔴Arm Wrestling Reborn has become a popular game for content creators that enjoy covering obscure games and has been featured on the HimeHina Channel, Waiwai's Movies, WayneRadioTV and more.

  • Note - If you plan on playing this in VR, it supports Oculus headsets only. 

The HimeHina Channel enjoying Arm Wrestling Reborn

  • Tap as fast as you can for more power!

  • Use Pull, Top Roll, Power Press and Soul Hold💀

  • 6 A.I computer arm wrestlers to pull, 7 locations

  • Workout to get stronger before each opponent

  • Instant replays🎥

  • Focus mode aka bullet time. (Slow motion)

  • Arm breaks (Watch your pressure, apply presses)

  • Match timer to challenge your best pins

  • Overall speedrun timer to challenge your best times

  • Optional to control your own camera man

  • Practice anytime on the brutal Robo-Tom arcade machine

  • 2 player VS

Single player mode

Wrestle 6 arm wrestling A.I opponents to qualify in a super match against world champion puller Chuck Mobb.

2 player local VS mode

Options to play against a friend at home.🏠

- Keyboard player VS. gamepad player

- Keyboard player VS. keyboard player

- VR player VS. keyboard player

2 player beta co-op mode

Have a friend play as the physical camera man, walk around on the keyboard and look with mouse, while the other player wrestles the A.I opponent in VR.

Command console💾

Type in console commands to change some in game options, enabling visual effects, shave your head, change shirts and some player skins.

See the Alien Cyber Coat YouTube for more gameplay videos of Arm Wrestling Reborn in action.
